description: A system dashboard with stat cards, progress bars, service status table, and an SVG bar chart
visual_assertions: The four stat cards should appear in a row with white background and border
Each card should show a metric label in small uppercase gray text above a large bold value
The percentage changes should appear in green (up) or red (down) below each card value
The progress bars should show colored fills at correct percentages (CPU 67%, Memory 45%, Disk 82%, Network 31%)
The service status table should have alternating row backgrounds
Status badges should be color-coded: 'Active' green, 'Degraded' amber, 'Down' red
The SVG bar chart should show 6 blue bars of varying heights representing Mon-Sat data
Y-axis labels (0, 2k, 4k, 6k) should appear to the left of the chart
X-axis labels (Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat) should appear below the bars
